questions.text: The phase of cell cycle where DNA replication occurs is:
questions.explanation: DNA replication occurs during S (synthesis) phase of interphase.

questions.text: Mitosis results in four daughter cells.
questions.explanation: Mitosis produces two genetically identical daughter cells. Meiosis produces four daughter cells.

questions.text: Crossing over occurs during ________ of meiosis I.
questions.explanation: Crossing over (exchange of genetic material) occurs during pachytene stage of Prophase I.

questions.correctAnswer: Cytokinesis is the division of cytoplasm that follows nuclear division (karyokinesis).
questions.explanation: In animal cells, cytokinesis occurs by cleavage. In plant cells, by cell plate formation.
